name: Spicy Tofu with Green Vegetables & Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Chili garlic sauce (or red chili flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine all the marinade ingredients. Add the tofu and let it sit about 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, slice all the vegetables and prepare the sauce by combining all the sauce ingredients in a small mixing bowl.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok and fry the marinated tofu until golden on all sides. Remove and place on paper towels to pat dry; discard excess oil.
4. Stir-fry the vegetables in the order listed above, being careful not to overcook.
5. At the last minute, pour the sauce over the cooked vegetables and add the tofu. Mix gently.
6. Serve over Oriental-style noodles (or rice as a variation).
